title: Daewoo Electric Fan Heater Upright and Flat Portable Heater With Carry Handle Safety Cut-Out Feature Adjustable Control & Fan Only Setting 2000W - White
features: Placement options - use the fan heater while it is flat or standing up depending on usage - use fan only setting for cooling
Portable heater - This heater is ideal for any home or office - The carry handle makes it ideal to take around wherever you need
2 heat settings - Choose your Optimum level of heat from the two options: 1000W or a toasty 2000W heat setting
Safe heating - The tip over switch ensures the heater will switch itself off if it tilts too far or falls over enabling you to heat rooms safely
Adjustable thermostatic control - use the thermostatic function to adjust the temperature of the heater
description: This Daewoo electric fan heater is ideal for any home or office. The heater is easily transported due to it being lightweight and its carry handle. Choose from The 2 heat settings for the optimum level of warmth, while staying safe with the tip over cut-out feature. Use the fan heater either flat or standing depending on usage, Use the fan only setting for cooling.
